A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent built the contingency table from clinical rows filtered by icd_o_3_site = 'C50.9' (call_k7mIJEgioOETlXWHb20Z3bHl) to approximate BRCA instead of correctly selecting the female BRCA cohort, leading to differing counts and a chi-square of 312.0178 rather than the ground-truth 305.1239.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After successfully retrieving BRCA clinical histology records (var_call_tREYuBfSBh6boibHLTOH7ozc) and CDH1 PASS mutations (var_call_mIYnBSmXfxEk5Pt6XoyR78sK), the execute_python step (call_BH2a17z4afHOc05rZCFLsICh) incorrectly processed/filtered the data such that the contingency table became empty (grand_total_n=0), leading the agent to return “unable to calculate,” even though the clinical preview clearly contained many FEMALE BRCA cases.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent built the BRCA female cohort by selecting clinical records with icd_10 LIKE 'C50%' (call_QJNyL8wunf9Pe0uPqXfykWfp) and parsing gender from narrative Patient_description text rather than using an explicit BRCA cohort filter, then merged with CDH1 PASS mutations (call_mvcmTHU4PrPAdvLcClgkPuf4), causing a mismatched patient set and an incorrect chi-square in the final computation (call_I2FXIq60LfUjImZjteM0m9oA).
